'''patusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynactinometer|dynactinometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynactinometer|dynactinometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| patusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pætisith|pætisith]] || [[word:pætisij|pætisij]] || [[word:pætisish|pætisish]] || [[word:pætisi|pætisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:patutusuth|patutusuth]] || [[word:patutusuj|patutusuj]] || [[word:patutusush|patutusush]] || [[word:patutusu|patutusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:patusuth|patusuth]] || [[word:patusuj|patusuj]] || [[word:patusush|patusush]] || [[word:patusu|patusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:patufsuth|patufsuth]] || [[word:patufsuj|patufsuj]] || [[word:patufsush|patufsush]] || [[word:patufsuf|patufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:patusuthu|patusuthu]] || [[word:patusuju|patusuju]] || [[word:patusushu|patusushu]] || [[word:patusuku|patusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:patusuth|patusuth]] || [[word:patusuj|patusuj]] || [[word:patusush|patusush]] || [[word:patusu|patusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:patusuthul|patusuthul]] || [[word:patusujul|patusujul]] || [[word:patusushul|patusushul]] || [[word:patusukul|patusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:patusuthuthu|patusuthuthu]] || [[word:patusujuju|patusujuju]] || [[word:patusushushu|patusushushu]] || [[word:patusuku|patusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:patusuthun|patusuthun]] || [[word:patusujun|patusujun]] || [[word:patusushun|patusushun]] || [[word:patusukun|patusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:patusuthuoro|patusuthuoro]] || [[word:patusujuoro|patusujuoro]] || [[word:patusushuoro|patusushuoro]] || [[word:patusukuoro|patusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
